author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Delivered: (1) SyncManager::git_commit_in_cache() checks local/worktree commit.gpgsign — signs when agent configured, bypasses when inherited global. (2) All 5 SyncManager commit sites migrated. (3) SharedWriter mutations.rs amend call routed through new git_commit_in_cache_with_args. (4) crosslink init auto-runs agent init to generate identity and SSH key by default.
